description:
Design a system expansion for an existing residential solar project. A SketchUp model is open with 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Smith_Residence_Existing.skp' loaded. The hip-roof building currently has a legacy solar array on the South-facing roof. Your task:

1. Use Skelion's component settings to define a new panel with dimensions: 2108 mm (length/height) by 1048 mm (width) and 400 W power.
2. Insert a new array of at least 6 of these panels in Portrait orientation on the West-facing roof slope (the adjacent empty triangular roof face).
3. Ensure the original legacy array on the South face is completely unmodified and intact.
4. Save the expanded model as 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Smith_Residence_Retrofit.skp'.
